tluaNoClass.tlua(20,4): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'p'.
tluaNoClass.tlua(20,6): error TS1005: ';' expected.
tluaNoClass.tlua(21,3): error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
tluaNoClass.tlua(21,3): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
tluaNoClass.tlua(21,7): error TS2304: Cannot find name 'a'.
tluaNoClass.tlua(21,11): error TS1005: ';' expected.


==== tluaNoClass.tlua (41 errors) ====
    // Classes are removed in tlua: `class` is an ordinary identifier (Lua has no
    // `class` keyword) and class declarations/expressions no longer parse. Each form
    // below produces natural parse errors (no tlua-specific diagnostic).
    
    class C {}
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
    
    class D extends C {}
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'D'.
            ~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
                    ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                    ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'C'.
    
    abstract class E {}
    ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'abstract'.
             ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
             ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
                   ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
                   ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'E'.
    
    class F {}
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'F'.
    
    local g = class {};
              ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
                    ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
    
    class WithMembers {
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
    ~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'class'.
          ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
          ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'WithMembers'.
      x = 1;
      ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'x'.
      m() {}
      ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'm'.
          ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      constructor() {}
      ~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'constructor'.
                    ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      static s() {}
      ~~~~~~
!!! error TS1128: Declaration or statement expected.
             ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 's'.
                 ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      #p = 2;
       ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'p'.
         ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
      get a() {
      ~~~
!!! error TS1434: Unexpected keyword or identifier.
      ~~~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'get'.
          ~
!!! error TS2304: Cannot find name 'a'.
              ~
!!! error TS1005: ';' expected.
        return 1;
      }
    }
    
    // `class` is now an ordinary identifier.
    function usesClassName(): number {
      local class = 3;
      return class;
    }
